query: SELECT fa.*, su.name as staff_name, su.role, su.manager_id, f.title as form_title FROM form_assignments fa JOIN staff_users su ON fa.staff_user_id = su.id JOIN forms f ON fa.form_id = f.id ORDER BY fa.id DESC LIMIT 20;
